---
id: userland-users-controller-reset-password-0
title: "Reset the password"
description: "Sets a new password using the `token` query parameter from the link that the user received. Successfully resetting the password will verify a user's email, if it hasn't been verified yet."
sidebar_label: "Reset the password"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Reset the password"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/user_management/password_reset/confirm"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sets a new password using the `token` query parameter from the link that the user received. Successfully resetting the password will verify a user's email, if it hasn't been verified yet.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
